title: Integrate Region A star into work selection
summary: Make real work selection consume region reachability, local A star, stale-result rejection and bounded exact pathing without global pawn scans.
acceptance: Work selection pathing consumes indexed caller-supplied candidates only and never scans the full map or all entities
Path requests carry map navigation region room and graph version bases and reject stale results before job mutation
Exact pathing is applied only to bounded Top-K candidates with deterministic ordering
Structured reasons distinguish unreachable stale invalid blocked no-route and node-budget outcomes
100 path requests under versioned invalidation produce artifact-backed queue node and stale-reject metrics

history.details: Created by WM-0032 M2 planning DAG; remains proposed until dependencies are done.

objective: Bind versioned pathing to indexed work selection for M2.
forbiddenPaths: packages/sim-worker/** unless blocked for architecture review first
benchmarkImpact: Extends 100-path evidence with work-selection candidate caps, path node counts, stale rejects and queue backlog.
reviewRouting: Owner completes to reviewer; systems-architect must be consulted before any public contract or version-basis change.
rollbackModel: Revert branch and benchmark additions. Do not merge full-map scans or unbounded queues as temporary workarounds.
ownerGate: Run every required check before taskctl complete

sparkEligibility.reason: Deterministic pathing and work-selection architecture are high-risk simulation work.
